name: Qubic
author: Parker Brothers (1953) / AGP port
description: Qubic — three-dimensional tic-tac-toe on a 4x4x4 cube (Parker Brothers, 1953). Two players alternately place a mark on any empty cell; the first to make a straight line of four (any of the cube's 76 winning lines — along an axis, across a face diagonal, or through a space diagonal) wins. A full board with no line is a draw. The four layers (z = 0..3) are shown as four side-by-side 4x4 grids; click any empty cell to place. Famously solved as a first-player win (Patashnik, 1980).
